name: Traffic - Phighting
description:
Save a horse, fuck a stoner

NSFW INTRO

Sucking off a chubby stoner and he smokes a blunt.

So uhhh I cut my thigh last night and I hope no one sees it today at school. I'd be so fucking terrified. I know I really need to stop with the harm, but I can't stop it. I might go back to my weed addiction to replace it.
creator: Ieatghostsforbreakfast
